title: codereview pass 1: coap_status.c dynamic map counts
description: Updated time/dodag map_counts to exact number of fields (conditionals for wall_clock/unix/source/parent/root). Root remains 9 base (uptime/mem/time/dodag/radio + txq/fwd 4 capacity) + batteries. Matches spec. Zephyr test clean. No P0-P1 findings.
